task_completion.description: Open and read the CAA ADS-B mandate document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/caa_adsb_mandate.txt.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and navigate to the vehicle parameters setup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl application is open, and the 'Parameters' tab under Vehicle Setup (gear icon) is visible.
QGroundControl parameter list showing ADSB_ENABLE set to 1 and AVD_ENABLE set to 1.

task_completion.description: Configure Avoidance warning and fail distances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl parameter list showing AVD_W_DIST_XY set to 1500, AVD_W_DIST_Z set to 300, AVD_F_DIST_XY set to 500, and AVD_F_DIST_Z set to 150.
QGroundControl parameter list showing AVD_F_ACTION set to 2.

task_completion.description: Export the configured parameters to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Parameters' dialog in QGroundControl or a file manager/terminal showing the creation of adsb_configured.params in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used QGroundControl to configure the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl GUI to search for and modify parameters, rather than just writing a text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually fake the exported parameters file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use QGroundControl's 'Tools -> Save to file' (or similar export function) to generate adsb_configured.params, not a text editor (like nano or gedit) to manually type the parameters.

integrity.description: Verify parameters were actually saved to the vehicle.
integrity.visual_evidence: In QGroundControl, modified parameters typically highlight or require a 'Save to Vehicle' action. Evidence should show these values were committed to the vehicle, not just typed into a search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The mandate document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/caa_adsb_mandate.txt. The required parameters and their exact values are: ADSB_ENABLE: 1, AVD_ENABLE: 1, AVD_W_DIST_XY: 1500, AVD_W_DIST_Z: 300, AVD_F_DIST_XY: 500, AVD_F_DIST_Z: 150, AVD_F_ACTION: 2. The final configuration must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/adsb_configured.params.
